validationRule: Exactly these two values. Non-canonical values are CI-failing defects.
Exactly these two values. Derived from card contract validation.

allowedValues: accepted_a | accepted_b | accepted_c | custom | keep_original | reject | deferred
validationRule: Exactly these seven values. Non-canonical values must not be written to the database.
Mapped from ProposalSeverity (high=must, medium=should, low=could) in queue assembly.

allowedValues: Line | Passage | Scene | Chapter | Structural | Manuscript

replace_selected_passage | insert_before_selected_passage | insert_after_selected_passage | rewrite_full_paragraph | rewrite_multi_paragraph_span | compress_selected_passage | delete_selected_passage | split_paragraph | merge_paragraphs | reorder_within_section | needs_targeting
validationRule: REVISION_OPERATIONS const array. needs_targeting is a valid operation value indicating the item requires targeting before workbench.
Exactly A, B, or C. Option roles: A=recommended_repair, B=rhythm_variant, C=bolder_rendering_shift.
CrossCheckVerdict enum. Only approve propagates to TrustedPath.

Runtime-certified field. full = all ready items decided with no unresolved non-ready cards. partial = one or more ready items were explicitly deferred. needs_targeting_deferred = all ready items decided while needs_targeting/withheld items remain outside completion blocking.
EvaluationMode enum, normalized from evaluation_result_v2.confirmed_mode. Never re-inferred in Revise.
VoicePreservationMode enum. MAXIMUM activates strictest voice gate in candidate generation.
WorkbenchSource enum. Priority order: evaluation first, surface_polish last.

allowedValues: open | findings_ready | synthesis_started | proposals_ready | applied | failed | failed_retryable
validationRule: RevisionSessionStatus. Allowed transitions: open→findings_ready→synthesis_started→proposals_ready→applied|failed|failed_retryable. applied and failed are terminal. failed_retryable allows re-entry to open (requires revision_failure_record_v1). Illegal transitions throw.
Client-generated unique identifier for each decision event. Must be globally unique within the session. Undo references undone_local_id.
Exact text excerpt from source manuscript that anchors the finding. Required unless manuscript_wide_support=true.
Append-only undo log entry. True rows must reference a valid undone_local_id. Mutations to existing rows are forbidden.
Share of queue items sourced from revision_opportunity_ledger_v1. Must be 100% — no queue item without ledger backing.
